ds GRTransform2D Rotate a two-dimensional figure based on the angle, and anchor point provided by the user. The angle, step, and anchor points can either be preset in the parameter edit window, or updated dynamically through the actor's por

or updated dynamically through the actor's ports. The angle can be specified in radians or degrees by selecting the angle type in the parameter edit window. Angles increase clockwise beginning at the positive X-axis in a Cartesian plan

ning at the positive X-axis in a Cartesian plane. If the accumulate parameter defined in the base class is set to true, any changes to the angle of rotation will be relative to the figure's current orientation. Otherwise, the angle specifi

current orientation. Otherwise, the angle specified will be relative to the positive X-axis. Since: Ptolemy II 4.0 Version: $Id: Rotate2D.java,v 1.11 2004/04/13 05:12:42 cxh Exp $ Author: Ismael M. Sarmiento, Steve Neuendorffer See Also: Serializ
